This type can contain an object of type System.Address on any platform
where GNAT is supported. It is made public on purpose so that it is
possible to take a 'Image of it.

array_types.name: String_List
array_types.code: type String_List is array (Positive range <>) of String_Access;

access_types.name: String_Access
access_types.code: type String_Access is access all String;

access_types.name: String_List_Access
access_types.code: type String_List_Access is access all String_List;

subprograms.name: Merge_String
subprograms.code:
function Merge_String
  (S : String_List_Access;
   C : Character := Location_Separator)
  return String

documentation.description: Concatenate S in a string and separate them with C.

subprograms.name: Missing
subprograms.code:
function Missing
  (Elt : String;
   Set : String_List)
  return Boolean

documentation.description: Is Elt missing in array Set.

subprograms.name: Quote
subprograms.code: function Quote   (S : String; C : Character := '"') return String

subprograms.name: Split_String
subprograms.code:
function Split_String
  (S : String;
   C : Character := Location_Separator)
  return String_List_Access

documentation.description: Return an array of substrings sperated by C in S.

In place transformation of a string with all the upper-case letters
changed into corresponding lower-case ones.
If S is quoted, return the content.

generic_instantiations.name: Free
generic_instantiations.code:
procedure Free is new Ada.Unchecked_Deallocation
  (Object => String, Name => String_Access);
